title: lagonychium stephanianum
intro: Lagonychium stephanianum is a type of traditional Ayurvedic medicinal plant, commonly known as 'Yavani' or 'Kutaja' in Hindi. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to India and Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, and its health benefits include anti-aging properties, immune system support, and wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lagonychium stephanianum, such as decoctions and infusions, are commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
